published_reference.label: Published FinanceBench reference
published_reference.notes: Context only, not apples-to-apples with this exact subset.

baseline.label: Naive-RAG baseline
baseline.notes: Real deterministic scores from results/baseline.json: 4 runs (1 per company), 28/28 subset items scored.

agent.label: Agent
agent.notes: SAMPLE: real deterministic scores from a single completed run (runs/agent-pepsico-full) -- 1 of 4 companies, 8/28 subset items. Full 4-company agent run lands in Step 17. answer_accuracy on this run is understated by a known scorer limitation: several PepsiCo items have a text-typed gold_answer (e.g. "$400,000,000 increase.") that the scorer exact-string-matches against the agent's normalized numeric answer (e.g. "400") -- citation_precision (0.8) and arithmetic_integrity (0.6) are a more reliable read of this sample's quality than answer_accuracy.
